    UserNameRecognizer - Class in userNameRecognizerTestbed
    Title: FSM-translated UserNameRecognizer.
    UserNameRecognizer() - Constructor for class userNameRecognizerTestbed.UserNameRecognizer
    Default constructor.
    userNameRecognizerErrorMessage - Static variable in class userNameRecognizerTestbed.UserNameRecognizer
    The error message text produced by the recognizer.
    userNameRecognizerIndexofError - Static variable in class userNameRecognizerTestbed.UserNameRecognizer
    The index within the input where an error was located (-1 if none).
    userNameRecognizerInput - Static variable in class userNameRecognizerTestbed.UserNameRecognizer
    The input string being processed by the recognizer.
